summary: Completed comprehensive navigation and page testing for SEO Automation landing page. All 18+ navigation links functional, all pages exist with real content, all forms working correctly.
passed_tests: All navbar section links scroll to correct sections (Features, Pricing, Testimonials)
Navbar 'Autentificare' link navigates to /login page
Navbar 'Începe Gratuit' button navigates to /register page
Hero 'Începe Trial Gratuit' button navigates to /register page
Hero 'Vezi Funcționalitățile' button scrolls to features section
Transparency 'Vezi Ghidul Complet' navigates to /ghid-configurare page
Transparency 'Afla mai multe' navigates to /ghid-configurare page
All pricing cards 'Începe Gratuit' buttons navigate to /register page
Footer CTA 'Începe Trial Gratuit de 7 Zile' navigates to /register page
Footer 'Termeni și Condiții' link navigates to /terms page with real legal content
Footer 'Confidențialitate' link navigates to /privacy page with real privacy policy
Footer 'Contact' link navigates to /contact page with working contact form
Contact form has all required fields (name, email, subject, message) and submit button
Contact form shows 'Mesaj trimis!' success message on submission
Register page has signup form with name, email, password fields and password visibility toggle
Login page has login form with email, password fields and password visibility toggle
Register and Login pages link to each other correctly
Setup Guide page shows 4 detailed configuration steps
All sub-pages have 'Înapoi la pagina principală' link back to homepage
Logo click from any page returns to homepage
Terms page contains comprehensive legal content (10+ sections)
Privacy page contains detailed GDPR-compliant privacy policy (9+ sections)
All pages load without errors and use consistent dark theme design
